summary: Comprehensive testing of MockupEditor component for T-Shirt Mockup placement feature. All 11 features tested successfully: upload flow, Customize button, MockupEditor dialog, print-safe area indicator, drag functionality, resize functionality, Reset to Center, Fit to Print Area, Front/Back view toggle, color selector, and Save & Continue flow.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint not found (legacy endpoint from previous iteration)

issues: View thumbnails use placeholder images from Unsplash - consider using actual product mockup thumbnails for consistency

critical_code_review_comments: MockupEditor.jsx has ESLint warnings about useEffect dependencies - safeAreaBounds object causes re-renders. Recommend wrapping in useMemo() for optimization
PRINT_SAFE_AREAS config properly defines printable zones with internal production specs (_printMethod, _maxWidthCm, etc.) hidden from creators
All interactive elements properly have data-testid attributes for testing
Editor supports T-Shirts, Hoodies, and Oversized T-Shirts as specified in EDITOR_SUPPORTED_PRODUCTS constant
seed_data_creation: Test images used from /app/test_images/ (created by previous testing agent)
context_for_next_testing_agent: MockupEditor fully tested. All drag/resize/toggle/color/save features working. Printify integration is MOCKED.

upload_flow_accepts_images.details: File input accepts PNG images, validates dimensions, moves to product selection

customize_button_on_products.details: Customize button visible on T-Shirts, Hoodies, Oversized T-Shirts (data-testid: edit-placement-{product})

mockup_editor_dialog_opens.details: Clicking Customize opens MockupEditor in full-screen dialog (data-testid: mockup-editor-dialog)

print_safe_area_indicator.details: Dashed blue border visible around printable zone (data-testid: print-safe-area)

design_drag_within_safe_area.details: Design can be dragged by clicking and moving mouse, constrained within safe area

design_resize_with_handles.details: Corner resize handles (nw, ne, sw, se) allow scaling design (data-testid: resize-handle-{corner})

reset_to_center_button.details: Resets design position and scale to defaults (data-testid: reset-position-btn)

fit_to_print_area_button.details: Scales design to 90% of safe area and centers it (data-testid: fit-to-area-btn)

front_back_view_toggle.details: VIEWS sidebar allows switching between front/back views (data-testid: view-front-btn, view-back-btn)

color_selector_changes_mockup.details: Color buttons change mockup image (white, black, navy, grey for T-Shirt) (data-testid: color-{color}-btn)

save_and_continue_flow.details: Save & Continue returns to product grid with placement saved, Edit button replaces Customize

full_submit_flow.details: Complete flow from upload to submit works - design appears in Under Review section

mocked_integrations: Printify API - all functions in printify_service.py are placeholders
eslint_warnings: MockupEditor.jsx: safeAreaBounds object causes useCallback/useEffect dependency warnings - wrap in useMemo()
MockupEditor.jsx: Missing onPlacementChange in useEffect dependency array
